hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && git -C /Users/marcus/Desktop/Everything/Projects/HavenInstruct/MVP add "$f" && (git -C /Users/marcus/Desktop/Everything/Projects/HavenInstruct/MVP diff --cached --quiet || git -C /Users/marcus/Desktop/Everything/Projects/HavenInstruct/MVP commit -m "auto: update $(basename \"$f\")"); } 2>/dev/null || true
